violations.text: The following was observed of non-food contact surfaces: 1) Inside of the prep units were observed with an accumulation of food debris 2) The inside of the cabinets in the cookline area was observed with an accumulation of food debris New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The walls in the 3-bay sink and food prep sink area has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The bottom drawer of the flip top prep unit was observed to be in poor repair (not sealing properly). Unit is to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. Person in charge to send proof of repairs to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1) Inside of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of food debris 2) side of the stove was observed with an accumulation of food debris New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The floors under the prep tables and equipment in the facility have an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
